codeReview.summary: The fix is correctly scoped and addresses the NoActiveWorker regression by replacing setup-only push_screen_wait usage with push_screen + dismiss callback. Behavior outside setup_only remains unchanged, and a focused regression test was added to cover setup-only mount/dismiss behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The tui-worker procedure currently conflicts with this mission-approved fix workflow: step 6 forbids script/subprocess TTY verification, but this feature contract explicitly requires detached PTY verification of `cc-sentiment setup` to prove the NoActiveWorker fix.
